entity.Name: SystemUser

Description.description: Person with access to the Microsoft CRM system and who owns objects in the Microsoft CRM database.
User's position in hierarchical security model.

entity.MobileOfflineFilters: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="systemuser"> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="modifiedon" operator="on-or-after" value="1900-01-01"/> </filter> </entity> </fetch>

Role.name: Accounts-AMS-Manager
Role.Description: For out-of-the-box entities only, can run an app in the environment and perform common tasks on the records they own. It has privileges to the core business tables, such as Account, Contact, and Activity.
Role.SummaryOfCoreTablePermissions: manager level privileges will be given

Role.name: Accounts-AMS-User
Role.Description: For out-of-the-box entities only, can run an app in the environment and perform common tasks on the records they own. It has privileges to the core business tables, such as Account, Contact, and Activity.
Role.SummaryOfCoreTablePermissions: user level privileges will be given

Role.name: IT - AMS- User
Role.Description: For out-of-the-box entities only, can run an app in the environment and perform common tasks on the records they own. It has privileges to the core business tables, such as Account, Contact, and Activity.
Role.SummaryOfCoreTablePermissions: user level privileges will be given

Role.name: IT - AMS-Manager
Role.Description: For out-of-the-box entities only, can run an app in the environment and perform common tasks on the records they own. It has privileges to the core business tables, such as Account, Contact, and Activity.
Role.SummaryOfCoreTablePermissions: manager level privileges will be given

WebResource.Name: ravi_ShowErrorMessage

Connector.description: Connects to OpenWeatherMap to get current weather data for any city.
Connector.name: ravi_5Fopenweather-20api

msdyn_dataflow.msdyn_mashupdocument: section Section1; shared Table1 = let Source = Excel.Workbook(Web.Contents("https://intimetecvisionsoft-my.sharepoint.com/personal/ravina_dhaka_intimetec_com/Documents/SalesSheet.xlsx"), null, true), #"Navigation 1" = Source{[Item = "Table1", Kind = "Table"]}[Data], #"Changed column type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Navigation 1", {{"OrderID", type text}, {"OrderDate", type date}, {"CustomerID", type text}, {"ProductID", type text}, {"Quantity", Int64.Type}, {"UnitPrice", type number}, {"TotalSale", type number}, {"Region", type text}}) in #"Changed column type";
msdyn_dataflow.msdyn_mashupsettings: {"QueryGroups":[],"DocumentLocale":"en-US","QueriesMetadata":{"Table1":{"QueryId":"c3ad5149-a53b-429c-85b2-79c410ce5e05","QueryName":"Table1","QueryGroupId":null,"EntityName":"cra7c_Salesdata","LastKnownIsCalculatedEntity":false,"LastKnownIsLinkedEntity":false,"LastKnownIsParameter":false,"IsHidden":null,"LastKnownResultTypeName":"table","LoadEnabled":true,"DeleteExistingDataOnLoad":false,"FieldsMetadata":{"cra7c_CustomerID":{"SourceColumnName":"CustomerID","DestinationFieldType":"Memo","AutoNumberSettings":null},"cra7c_OrderDate":{"SourceColumnName":"OrderDate","DestinationFieldType":"DateOnly","AutoNumberSettings":null},"cra7c_Quanity":{"SourceColumnName":"Quantity","DestinationFieldType":"Integer","AutoNumberSettings":null},"cra7c_Region":{"SourceColumnName":"Region","DestinationFieldType":"Memo","AutoNumberSettings":null},"PartitionId":{"SourceColumnName":"OrderID","DestinationFieldType":"Memo","AutoNumberSettings":null}},"HostProperties":{"MappingEditorProperties":"{}"},"JsonOutputDestinations":null,"BindToDefaultOutputDestination":null,"JsonIncrementalRefreshSettings":null,"JsonStagingDefinition":null}},"FastCombine":false,"AllowNativeQueries":false,"HostContext":{"Type":"CdsT","Details":{"EnvironmentId":"92dd8695-2854-e876-9ac8-6f7a832fd6d7"}},"HostProperties":null,"SkipAutomaticTypeAndHeaderDetection":false,"DisableAutoAnonymousConnectionUpsert":false,"AllowedModules":null,"DataflowMetadata":"{\"DataflowType\":\"Cdst\",\"DataflowId\":\"877aaf5f-b2f1-4abb-a307-f4fc35a5ae31\",\"OwnerUserId\":\"7c8fa2e2-4a49-49f5-a230-67cd3a11985d\",\"OwnerName\":\"Unknown\",\"OwnerTenantId\":\"18323149-cc4d-4bff-809d-3eda6caec73a\",\"GatewayObjectId\":null,\"ModelSnapshotUri\":\"\",\"GroupId\":\"92dd8695-2854-e876-9ac8-6f7a832fd6d7\",\"DataflowState\":\"Source\",\"LastUpdateTime\":\"2026-01-30T08:58:39.2848644+00:00\",\"LastStateChangedTime\":\"2026-01-30T08:58:39.2848644+00:00\",\"CreatedTime\":\"2026-01-30T08:40:58.1317564+00:00\",\"ExpiresAfter\":\"2026-02-01T07:40:58.13046
